channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Are perps swaps? A quick look at that CME suit: State of Crypto
item.description: CME Group sued the CFTC on Thursday, alleging that the agency was wrong in how it approved Kalshi's first U.S. perpetual futures product.

item.title: Inception Labs' Mercury 2 AI Beats Google's DiffusionGemma at Its Own Game
item.description: Both models trade word-by-word generation for parallel denoising. Only one of them does it without losing intelligence in the trade.

item.title: AI 'Amplification Spiral' May Be Causing Delusions Among Users, Study Suggests
item.description: New research outlines how chatbot behaviors, including personalization, mirroring, and excessive agreement, reinforce delusions.

item.title: JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints at buying more Bitcoin. "Looks better with more dots." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1LUEsxenpGWnQ5U3lpbndaaElnejNTaEUtYnRMcnZQRUF0OU83RlBsVnVSUTFUa2YxSHJoc0dTd1E3NGhReW9QWF9penVGRjRMdGtSUFQ2UEswTXY1Nnd6QTVB?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints at b…

item.title: JUST IN: Ethereum's most notorious sandwich bot, jaredfromsubway.eth, has been drained of $7.5M + An attacker spent weeks deploying fake tokens and liquidity pools to trick the bot into approving transfers, then draining its $WETH, $USDC and $USDT. - x.com

item.title: 🚨 ALERT: Ethereum MEV bot JaredFromSubway has been drained of around $7.5M, per Blockaid. The attacker already laundered some via Tornado Cash. - x.com

item.title: 💥BREAKING: 🇺🇸 Senate leaders are holding emergency meetings next week in a last-minute effort to save the Clarity Act before the clock runs out. - x.com

item.title: 🚨 NEW: Thailand seized 315 illegal Bitcoin mining rigs tied to an alleged $1.2 million electricity theft scheme. - x.com

item.title: Ethereum's biggest 'sandwich' bot drained of $7.5 million in ironic exploit
item.description: Blockaid said an attacker tricked Jaredfromsubway.eth into approving fake trading routes, then used those approvals to drain WETH, USDC and USDT.

item.title: Happy Father’s Day! Save some crypto for your kids. They will thank you one day. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTFBGM3NEM01RRkxIN1JEYlFQMm1JdlFhRWZJeV94QWZFQU5Yb0QweF9ubEFoZzJtX0RERzdkVlpmODNUVVU1dFNlWnZlMGdrNUxzQ0xfUVM1dnE3ckMtRkkzUA?oc=5" target="_blank">Happy Father’s Day! Save some crypto…

item.title: Bitcoin holds near $64,000 as a renewed Hormuz threat clouds US-Iran ceasefire talks
item.description: Crypto firmed over the weekend after Friday's sell-off, with bitcoin recovering toward $64,000. Permanent ceasefire talks open in Switzerland, but Iran's order to close the Strait of Hormuz again revives the risk the deal was meant to sett…

item.title: U.S. Spot Bitcoin ETFs See Record $6.35B Outflow Over 30 Days According to Galaxy Research, U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs have posted their largest 30-day net outflow on record. Data shows the funds saw $6.35 billion in net outflows over the past 30 days, rankin - x.com

item.title: Ethereum's Well-Known MEV Bot JaredFromSubway Exploited, Suffers $7.5 Million Loss Blockchain security firm Blockaid reported that Ethereum MEV bot JaredFromSubway lost approximately $7.5 million after attacker-controlled contracts tricked its automat - x.com

item.title: OpenRouter's Fusion Promises Claude Fable-Level AI for Cheap—Right as Fable 5 Goes Dark
item.description: OpenRouter's compound-model API stacks budget AI models—and beat GPT-5.5 and Claude Opus 4.8 outright in benchmark testing.

item.title: AI is making crypto security cheaper, faster and harder to ignore
item.description: As AI-powered security tools become cheaper, faster and more widely available, researchers said they could reshape what the crypto industry considers reasonable due diligence before deploying code, potentially altering expectations for dev…

item.title: Bitcoin Network Activity Is Rising as BTC Falls Nearly 50% Below Peak Price: CryptoQuant
item.description: Activity on the Bitcoin network is surging, CryptoQuant said, but it's not correlating with price movement for its native asset.

item.title: How STRC lost its par: The timeline behind Strategy's preferred-stock meltdown
item.description: From a bond buyback and dwindling cash reserves to a bitcoin bear market, the sequence of events that turned STRC's par-value challenge into a marketwide debate.

item.title: When I gave this speech in October 2022, Bitcoin traded near $20,000, Strategy held 130,000 BTC worth about $2.6 billion, and $MSTR was ~$24 split-adjusted. Weeks later, after Bitcoin fell below $16,000, our debt exceeded the combined value of our BTC a - x.com

item.title: At Least Eight Senior Ethereum Foundation Members Have Departed in Five Months According to Unchained, Ethereum Foundation co-executive director and board member Hsiao-Wei Wang has resigned, effective Thursday. The report said the departure co - x.com

item.title: Charles Schwab Planning to Roll Out S&P 500 Prediction Markets With Cboe: WSJ
item.description: Global financial institution Charles Schwab is the latest firm hoping to steal a piece of the growing prediction market pie.

item.title: House Republican Introduces Insider Trading Bill to Ban Lawmaker Prediction Market Bets
item.description: The bill is meant to curb potential insider trading, blocking lawmakers and family members from policy-related prediction market bets.

item.title: JUST IN: Bitcoin transaction count total nears all-time highs 👀 🚀 - x.com

item.title: Bitcoin (-28%) and Gold (-2%) are the two worst performing major assets so far in 2026. This is something we haven't seen before in any calendar year. Video: youtube.com/watch?v=sMF_Nh… - x.com

item.title: GPT-5.6 Rumors Heat Up as Users Swear ChatGPT Suddenly Got Smarter
item.description: Many AI users are convinced that OpenAI is quietly running GPT-5.6 inside ChatGPT. OpenAI isn't confirming anything.

item.title: Schwab to join prediction markets race with S&P 500 event-based options: WSJ
item.description: The planned offering would let customers bet on index moves as Coinbase and Robinhood expand in the sector.

item.title: The 5 Largest Publicly Traded Solana Treasury Firms
item.description: Institutions are gobbling up Solana for their balance sheets. These are the top publicly traded treasuries.

item.title: Strive Blames Leverage Liquidations After SATA and Bitcoin Giant Strategy's STRC Plunge
item.description: The disastrous day for Bitcoin firms' preferred equity offerings may have been due to unwinding of leveraged positions in STRC and SATA.

item.title: JUST IN: While everyone else is selling, Morgan Stanely's Bitcoin ETF bought over $25 million in BTC so far this week 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE0wb01rTk9HQW41Y3AxTG5mSTVnb2FTS1ZfeUFfdVFNM3dYQTZmMHFBVE1mUFAzS1VhTGl3X0YxWmgwMkNFbG1KZW5XV0hrTFZLWUs4Zmh6ZlFPcVhpYkxMSDZRX2JzQVU?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: While everyone els…

item.title: Base (@base) / Posts / X - x.com
item.description: Base (@base) / Posts / X x.com

item.title: Amazon Won't Release Sam Altman Film 'Artificial' Following $50 Billion OpenAI Investment
item.description: Amazon is pulling out of "Artificial," a film about Sam Altman's brief ouster from OpenAI, not long after investing $50 billion in the firm.

item.title: Anime Girls Could Steal Your Crypto as Wallpaper Malware Targets Steam Gamers
item.description: Researchers found malicious Wallpaper Engine downloads on Steam Workshop distributing infostealers, backdoors, and account-hijacking malware.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 FBI Director Kash Patel says the FBI will find crypto scammers and "will bring you to justice! 👀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE9Iaml2Y2plQ29pU3FwQ0lBQks5ZW9NSEl4bHN1ai1uOXdaT1lEM09HN3FMX3JqUy1FdUV5R3JGQkFheDlLNnh2bkpXTVR1RnFmNzEzeWZpOW0zblVGTHM2YnBLODRSSFk?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 FBI Director …

item.title: GoMining challenges Jack Dorsey's Square with payments system designed around bitcoin
item.description: GoMining unveiled a software development kit and programmable access for its bitcoin payment protocol GoBTC Pay, allowing merchants to accept BTC for everyday purchases.

item.title: INSIGHT: A former Ethereum Foundation contributor warns $ETH's core development ecosystem could face a funding crisis within 3-9 months as the EF scales back spending. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE9hZWQ2Y25QekZQNjJScUhnOHlMNzl4UUFhVkI0b3dFNjdCbVZ2X2EyU2FjU3NmdGZ2bXZqaVdLYjc4ZEpDUUI3X2t3ZGVmdHVrVXNRN2tZU0tfM2ZBYlE?oc=5" target="_blank">INSIGHT: A former Ethereum Foundation c…

item.title: Franklin Templeton proposes new ETFs that turn corporate dividends into bitcoin
item.description: Your day-ahead look for June 19, 2026

item.title: Texas Brothers Plead Guilty to $8M Armed Crypto Kidnapping
item.description: Isiah and Raymond Garcia held a Minnesota family at gunpoint for eight hours and forced the father to transfer over $8 million in crypto.

item.title: Smart-contract and DeFi coins lead losses as bitcoin wilts for 4th straight day
item.description: Concerns about STRC, the dividend-paying preferred stock from Strategy continue to dominate market sentiment.

item.title: Franklin Templeton Files for ETFs That Funnel Stock Dividends Into Bitcoin
item.description: The asset manager's two proposed "Bitcoin DRIP" funds would hold U.S. stocks and reinvest dividends into Bitcoin, a novel ETF structure.

item.title: Digital credit market hit by huge selloff as Strive CEO blames leverage liquidations
item.description: Matt Cole says forced selling from leveraged investors pushed STRC and SATA sharply lower before both rebounded.

item.title: Microsoft found malware that hijacks crypto wallets and spreads through USB sticks
item.description: The software intercepts shortcut files and directs them to install a worm that harvests private keys from the Windows clipboard and inserts its own destination wallet addresses when it detects a transfer.

item.title: Markets are closed today. Volatility is never easy. Bitcoin keeps working. So do we. Thank you for your support. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTFBENlpESjJPODFwMXdicklQTDY3alR4X2lUSTRxM1NXQWY3NncwSnZ2YmRpLWc2YTVMaDRUdWRXdDQyTTBEcjN5bmljb2xaMDVuOENCY2FTZ2ZIUFU?oc=5" target="_blank">Markets are closed today. Volatility is nev…

item.title: Binance - x.com
item.description: Binance x.com

item.title: XRP falls 3% after losing $1.15 support as breakout attempt fades
item.description: Heavy selling pushed XRP back below a key support zone, reinforcing a downtrend that has repeatedly stalled rallies near $1.25.

item.title: Live markets: Bitcoin under pressure as Saylor comments on STRC selloff
item.description: About 20% of miners are now unprofitable, and publicly traded miners sold more than 32,000 bitcoin in the first quarter to cover operating costs, more than they offloaded in all of 2025.

item.title: Bitcoin traders load up on bearish bets all the way down to $52,000
item.description: Bitcoin traders are scrambling to buy options bets that would pay off if the selloff deepens.

item.title: Bitcoin falls below $63,000 as risk assets sell off and the week's bounce fades
item.description: Crypto dropped across the board on Friday in holiday-thinned trading, giving back the week's gains. With oil down 9% and the Iran deal signed, the question turns to whether this cycle gets an altseason at all.

item.title: China’s Z.AI Releases GLM-5.2: A Model That Rivals Claude Opus—Using Zero Nvidia Chips
item.description: Z.ai's GLM-5.2 sits within 1% of Claude Opus 4.8 on long-horizon coding benchmarks, runs entirely on Huawei silicon, and undercuts Western frontier models by up to 82% per token.

item.title: Midjourney Pivots From AI Images to Medical Imaging, Aiming to Build a Better MRI Alternative
item.description: Image generation company Midjourney is developing a full-body imaging system that combines ultrasound tech with AI smarts.

item.title: CFTC Hits Celsius Crypto Fraudster Alex Mashinsky With Permanent Trading Ban
item.description: The settlement ensures that convicted Celsius founder Alex Mashinsky is unable to trade in CFTC markets or register with the regulator.

item.title: Algorand Plans to Be Ready for Quantum Computing Threat by End of 2027
item.description: Quantum computing threatens the blockchain ecosystem, from Bitcoin to Ethereum and beyond, and Algorand has a plan to be prepared.

item.title: Ethereum Foundation Exodus Continues as Co-Director Hsiao-Wei Wang Departs
item.description: Another key figure at the Ethereum Foundation is stepping away from her post, continuing a recent leadership exodus.

item.title: Perplexity's AI Agent Now Has a Brain That Learns From Its Own Mistakes
item.description: Brain is a self-improving memory layer that tracks what Computer did, what worked, and what failed—then uses it overnight to make the next task faster and cheaper.

item.title: Ex-Celsius CEO Mashinsky gets U.S. CFTC ban in final resolution with regulator
item.description: Alexander Mashinsky, the founder of failed crypto lender Celsius, had earlier been imprisoned for fraud and is now formally banned from CFTC registration.

item.title: Europe's Crypto Firms Face Squeeze as MiCA Transition Period End Looms
item.description: As the MiCA grace period closes, only a fraction of registered firms hold full licenses, setting up the prospect of a wave of consolidation.

item.title: U.S. agencies seek stablecoin customer-ID rules akin to banks in new GENIUS Act pitch
item.description: The Federal Reserve, Treasury and other regulators have issued a proposed rule that would set identification standards, and it's now open for public comments.

item.title: Ethereum Foundation loses another key leader as co-executive director Hsiao-Wei Wang resigns
item.description: Wang's departure follows the resignation of fellow co-executive director Tomasz Stańczak and marks the latest in a string of high-profile exits at the EF.

item.title: Crypto for Advisors: Trading the bitcoin cycle
item.description: Bitcoin’s 4-year cycle makes DCA costly. Learn why a cycle-smart strategy is essential for advisors to better manage volatility and maximize client returns.

item.title: Algorand unveils roadmap to achieve quantum resistance by 2028
item.description: The announcement reflects a crypto's growing recognition that adopting quantum-resistant cryptography could take years, requiring changes not only to user wallets but also to core protocol infrastructure.
